## Validation

- [ ] Backend lint, type check, and tests
- [ ] Frontend lint, type check, and build
- [ ] SDK type check and build, if changed
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior changed

## Financial and Security Review

- [ ] Preserves double-entry ledger invariants
- [ ] Preserves tenant isolation and permission checks
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, local databases, or generated artifacts included
